---
title: "Learning Objectives"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-tip icon="false"}

## Learning objectives

After completing this chapter, learners will be able to:

- Explain the indications and limitations of the FAST examination.
- Obtain all standard FAST views.
- Recognize normal anatomy in each view.
- Identify free intraperitoneal and pericardial fluid.
- Interpret FAST findings according to the clinical context.
- Recognize common pitfalls and avoid frequent mistakes.

:::
